mapper.insert: INSERT INTO correction_request (user_id, request_key, application_case_id, correction_type, source_type, source_ref_id, original_text, improved_text, result_json, source_snapshot, status, ai_usage_log_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{requestKey}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{correctionType}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{originalText}, #{improvedText}, #{resultJson}, #{sourceSnapshot}, #{status}, #{aiUsageLogId})
